category.scope_note: Electric and cordless hand-held, transportable, and lawn/garden power tools exported from China to Ecuador.

title.en: China-to-Ecuador Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入厄瓜多尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入厄瓜多爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Ecuador INEN national standards, the RTE Certificate of Conformity regime, electrical safety, EMC, noise, restricted substances, and battery and radio requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与厄瓜多尔 INEN 国家标准、RTE 符合性证书制度、电气安全、电磁兼容、噪声、限用物质以及电池和无线电要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與厄瓜多爾 INEN 國家標準、RTE 符合性證書制度、電氣安全、電磁相容、噪聲、限用物質以及電池和無線電要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Ecuador law, NTE INEN standards, RTE technical regulations, the Certificate of Conformity process, electrical and grid requirements, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行厄瓜多尔法律、NTE INEN 标准、RTE 技术法规、符合性证书流程、电气和电网要求及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行厄瓜多爾法律、NTE INEN 標準、RTE 技術法規、符合性證書流程、電氣和電網要求及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Ecuador, the mandatory baseline is conformity with applicable NTE INEN national standards (commonly aligned with IEC 62841) and, where the product is covered by a Reglamento Tecnico Ecuatoriano (RTE), an INEN Certificate of Conformity before customs clearance; cordless tools with radio functions also fall under ARCOTEL homologation, and tools must operate on Ecuador's 120/220 V 60 Hz grid rather than China's 220/380 V 50 Hz.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入厄瓜多尔，强制基线是符合适用的 NTE INEN 国家标准（通常与 IEC 62841 对齐），并在产品受厄瓜多尔技术法规 RTE 管辖时，于清关前取得 INEN 符合性证书；带无线电功能的无绳工具还须经 ARCOTEL 认证，且工具须适配厄瓜多尔 120/220 V 60 Hz 电网，而非中国 220/380 V 50 Hz。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入厄瓜多爾，強制基線是符合適用的 NTE INEN 國家標準（通常與 IEC 62841 對齊），並在產品受厄瓜多爾技術法規 RTE 管轄時，於清關前取得 INEN 符合性證書；帶無線電功能的無繩工具還須經 ARCOTEL 認證，且工具須適配厄瓜多爾 120/220 V 60 Hz 電網，而非中國 220/380 V 50 Hz。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment body, customs, or primary legal source preferred.
